positive: A detailed, symmetrical mandala-style celestial forest scene. The core subject features stylized, overlapping geometric foliage (eucalyptus, monstera shapes) intertwined with luminous, bioluminescent cosmic elements (swirls of nebula gas, crescent moons, stylized constellations). The design must use strong, contrasting silhouettes against a deep indigo and teal background. Incorporate gold leaf texture accents and fine line work reminiscent of etching. The composition should be perfectly centered, suitable for seamless tiling or a single chest print. Style: Modern bohemian, Art Nouveau meets Scientific Illustration. Lighting: High contrast, backlighting, glowing edges. Color Palette: Deep midnight blue, teal, emerald green, glowing gold, black silhouette. Ideal for apparel, tapestry, or wall art.
negative: blurry, cropped, lowres, watermark, text, logo, dirty, graffiti, asymmetrical, cartoon, anime, low detail, artifacts, poor anatomy, extra limbs, muted colors
